title: DISSEMINATION OF NOTIFICATION INDIAN AIR FORCE OPEN RECRUITMENT RALLY
Lungleiah District Disposal Committee-in ruihhlo (heroin no. 4) ₹9,18,000/- man hu an hal ral
content:
4597/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Ramtuk thla ni 25:Nimin tlai khan Lunglei AP Tlanga Incinerator Centre-ah Lunglei District Disposal Committee (DCC) chuan an Chairman, Lunglei District Superintendent of Police Pu J. Lalmuankima kaihhruaiin ruihhlo (heroin no. 4) gram 56.77 (₹9,18,000/- man hu) an hal ral.

Ruihhlo hal ralnaah hian DDC member-te – Lunglei Sub-Divisional Officer (Sadar), Lunglei Excise & Narcotics Assistant Commissioner, Lunglei Sub-Divisional Police Officer leh an ai awhte an tel a. Heroin no. 4 hal ral tak hi Lunglei PS Case No. 196/2025 Dt. 22.12.2025 u/s 21(b)/29 ND&PS Act leh LLI-PS C/No. 183/2025 Dt.12.11.2025 u/s 21(b) ND&PS Act hnuaia case ziah luh niin, Lunglei Judicial Magistrate First Class-I-in phalna a pek anga hal ral (pre-trial dispose) a ni.

Attachment

title: MP LAD FUND ATANGA TUIRIAL KAWNGPUI SIAL RAJYA SABHA MP IN TLAWH
content:
4596/2025-2026

Dt 25.2.2026:Nimin khan Rajya Sabha MP Pu K.Vanlalvena chuan Ratu khua atanga Tuirial tuikhuah panna kawng MP Fund hmanga laih zawh thar chu a hmunah kalin a enfiah. Ratu khaw mipui ten an ram thui tak chim tu Tuirial tuikhuah chu tangkai zawka an hman theih a, a hmun thlenga motor a kal theih nan MP Fund hmangin kawng a laih sak a.Kawng laih tlang a nih hnu hun rei lote chhung pawhin mi tamtak ten sangha mana eizawnna an hmuh phah nghal mai bak ah lo neitu ten an thlai thar te hahdam zawkin an phurh chhuah theih phah dawn a ni.

Rajya Sabha MP chuan Ratu PHC tlawh nghalin CSR fund hmanga Ratu PHC tihchangtlun dan tur te a enfiah bawk a. Ratu damdawiinah doctor pangngai awm rih loh avanga Darlawn damdawiin atanga doctor pakhatin a hmui avanga harsatna an tawh thu an lo hruilh a ni.

Rajya Sabha MP hi Pu Lalhmingthanga Executive Member, Sinlung Hills Council, Ratu bialtu nilai leh Ratu khawtlang hruaitu ten an tawiawm a ni.

title: ELECTRIC BILL CHUNGCHANGA MIPUI HNENA P&ED HRIATTIRNA
content:
4595/2025-2026

Aizawl, 23rd February, 2026:Power & Electricity Department chuan a hnuai ami ang hian Smart Billing System hnuaia Electric Bill chungchangah mipui hnena hriattirna a chhuah:

Hun rei tak Mihring (Meter reader) hmanga electric bill siam thin a nih avangin Thla 1 (khat) liamta bill consumer in kan dawng thin a, nimahsela, Aizawl Khawpuia Consumer thenkhat, Smart Billing System a lut thar a piang te chu Up-to-date a bill siam a lo tul ta a, hei vang hian thla 1 kar awl siamrem a ngaih avangin thla 1 aia rei bill (billing period Ni 30 aia rei) vawi khatah siam a lo ngai ta a, Electric Bill amount a lo sang ta thin a ni. Nimahsela, he bill sang bik hi Smart Billing system a lut thar apiangte chu an luh thla (vawi 1) chiah a ni dawn a ni.

Tin, Smart Meter billing system ah chuan remote hmanga reading lak a nih tawh avangin meter reader-in reading lak sual palh (Human error) a awm tawh lova, Consumer te'n electric kan hman man (Bill) dik thei ang bera siam a lo ni ta a ni. Meter chhiat vang emaw human error hrang hrang emaw vanga hun rei tak Electric Bill diklo chawi tawh te pawhin electric hman man dik tak kan chawi a ngai tawh dawn a, Electric bill (Rate) erawh Sawrkarin a ti danglam lo a ni tih kan in hriattir a ni. Billing period rei vanga vawi khata bill pek tlak harsa te tan Bill counter ah kalin installment a pek theih a ni ang.

Smart Billing System ah pawh hian tih sual palh (set sual palh) awm thei tho a ni a, Consumer te'n kan bill dawn ah diklo emaw sang lutuk ni a hria kan awm anih chuan mahni bialtu SDO Office ah complain ni se, electric bill complain turin bill pek hmasak phawt a ngai kher lova, complain chu min enfiah sakin tih dik loh palh a awm chuan chinfel phawt tur a ni a, chinfel hnuah chauh Bill chu pek zawk tur a ni. Hetianga electric bill complain kan siam a, kan bill chu a dik lo a nih pawha pek hmasak phawt a tul nia sawi an awm chuan SDO hnenah complain theh luh vat tur a ni a, a tul anga action lak tur a ni ang. Nimahsela, Bill dik tak a nih erawh chuan kan electric hman man dik tak chu chawi hreh lo turin consumer te kan in ngen a, kan electric hman man dik tak kan chawi theih nan Department chuan theih tawp a chhuah zel dawn a ni.

title: FCS&CA MINISTER-IN AIZAWL EAST LEH WEST DCSO SAK THAR TUR LUNGPHUM A PHUM
content:
4594/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 25th February, 2026 :Vawiin khan Pu B. Lalchhanzova, Minister, Food, Civil Supplies and Consumers Affairs (FCS&CA) Department chuan Aizawl East leh Aizawl West District Civil Supplies Office (DCSO) building sak thar tur lungphum chu MINECO-ah a phum.

Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan thu sawiin, Aizawl district-a DCSO Office pahnih awmte chu an awmna a inhlat deuh avang leh office building pahnihte chu mimal in, sum chawia luah a nih ve ve avangin mahni puala office thar a ding tur chu lawawm a tih thu a sawi a. Kum 39 chhung office atan mimal in luah a nih hnua mahni puala office tha tak an nei ve tawh tur chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi bawk a. Miniser chuan office hlui leh chul rup mai hian a thawktu leh a dawrtute rilru thui takin a nghawng thu sawiin, office thar tha tak an neih hunah chuan thawktute pawh phurna nasa zawk a pek a beisei thu a sawi a. Mahni bialtu DCSO hriat fuh loh avangte, DCSO awmna in sawn ngaite leh office pahnih dawr kawp ngaite tan chuan DCSO pahnihte hmunkhata dah khawm anni tur chu awlsamna thlentu a nih bakah sum leh hun tamtak hum saktu a nih a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Aizawl East leh West DCSO building hi cheng Vaibelchhe 8 senga SASCI 2024-25 (Part - I) atanga sak tur niin, Mizopa chhiara chhawng 6-a sak tur a ni a. A building pum hi square feet 18,341 tura ruahman a ni a, thla 30 chhunga sak zawh tura ruahman a ni. A sak hna hi Eastmen Consultancy, Aizawl ten an thawk dawn a ni.

Lungphum phumna hun hi FCS&CA Secretary Pi Teresy Vanlalhruaii’n a kaihruaia a, a sak hna thawk tur Eastmen Consultancy-ten hna kalpui dan turte sawifiahin, FCS&CA Addl. Secretary Dr Andrew H. Vanlaldika’n kalkhawmte lawmthu hrilhin hun a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: MHIP-IN ‘WOMEN ICON AWARD 2026’ DAWNGTU MINISTER PI LALRINPUII LAWMPUINA AN HLAN
content:
4593/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 25th February, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizo Hmeichhe Insuihkhawm Pawl (MHIP) General Headquarters chuan Treasury Square-a an Office-ah February ni 11, 2026-a New Delhi-a Achievers’ World, Indian Achievers’ Forum leh All India Business & Community Foundation (AIBCF)-te tanghovin an buatsaih ‘National Summit 2026 - Vikshit Bharat 2047 through Comprehensive Socio-Economic Development’-a ‘Women Icon Award 2026’ dawngtu Pi Lalrinpuii, Minister, Health & Family Welfare Department; Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Department chu lawmpuina an hlan.

Lawmpuina dawngtu Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan MHIP chungah lawmthu sawiin, Award a dawn dan chanchin a sawi a. A chanchin hriate’n Women Icon Award dawng turin a hming an lo rawtsak a, he Award buatsaihtute hian Bangalore-a hmeichhia leh mi harsate a lo tanpui thin dan te leh Mizorama hmeichhe Cabinet Minister hmasa ber a nih thu te lo hriain, a Department chante’n Viksit Bharat 2047 nena inrem takin Mizoram Universal Health Care Scheme hmanga mipuite hnena man pe lawk lo (cashless)-a health insurance an pek bakah ‘Ruangphurh’ policy hmanga mi retheite in lum ngeia an chhungte ruang an phurh thlensak chu ropui an ti a, India ram tana Mizoram chhunga a hnathawh chu chawimawi tlakah an ngai a ni, a ti.

Pi Lalrinpuii chuan Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) pawimawhzia leh Mizoram pawna a hun hman thin ram tana a hlawkzia sawi bawkin, Award a dawn tuma Mizoram chu CSR dawng tlem ber a nih avanga company liante chu CSR rawn chhunglut tura a sawmna chuan ‘Father of CSR in India’ tia an koh thin Dr. Bhaskar Chatterjee-a beng verhin, CSR 1% chauh luhna Mizoram chu a tinzawn nghal dawn a, an indawr mek thu leh Aizawl lo tlawh a tum thu a sawi a. Tin, Bhubaneswar-a CSR & Sustainability Conclave 2025 an chhim tumin thil thar siam chhuaktute nen indawrin, Mizorama mitdel zawng zawngin mitdel tiang tha chi an dawn theih nan Toyota atangin CSR cheng vbc 2 dil mek a ni, a ti a. Zoram Medical College & Hospital (ZMC&H)-a lung zaina tur Operation Theatre (OT) sak nan leh bungraw lei nan State Bank of India Mutual Fund-in cheng vbc 4.4 an pe a, sak mek a ni a; Indian Oil Corporation Ltd. (IOCL) atangin ZMC&H-a Neurosurgery OT sak nan cheng vbc 2.2 dawn a nih thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Minister chuan MHIP changtlun zel nana theihtawp a chhuahpui tur thu sawi bawkin, MHIP chu rual ute’n hmeichhe tanpui ngaite leh khawtlanga harsatna tawkte tanpui a, hmeichhiate tana hamthatna awm apiang ngaihtuahpui a, hmeichhiate hmasawn theihna tura an lo din a nih anga vawng nung zel turin a chah a ni.

He hun hi Pi Lalliani, President-in kaihruaiin, hmeichhe Minister viak tha leh hna chak Mizoramin a nei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Pi Irene Lalruatkimi, General Secretary chuan Minister-in Mizoram tana a hna thawh that avanga chawimawina a dawng chu MHIP chuan chhuangin a lawmpui thu leh ram leh hnam tana ke a pen zelna turah duhsakna an hlan tih sawiin, pawl aiawhin lawmpuina citation a hlan a ni.

Attachment

title: Saitualah District Planning Committee thu khawm
content:
4592/2025-2026

Saitual, the 25th February, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Room, Saitualah, Saitual District Planning Committee chu an chairperson, District Bawrhsap ni bawk, Pu Srinivas Sadi kaihhruainain an thu khawm.

He hunah hian District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan thu a sawi a, department hrang hrang hotute chu Mizoram District Transformation Programme hnuaiah District Catalytic Intervention Plan (DCIP) siam tura tih an nih angin, an proposal thehluh te sawihona an nei dawn a ni, a ti.

Bawrhsap chuan hmasawnna chu hmun khatah chauh thleng lo se a duh thu a sawi a, MLA bial tinah project te pawh insem darh theih ni se, khawtlang mipui pawhin a huap zau zawkin an chhawr thei dawn a ni, a ti. Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan district tana tha ber tur leh khawtlang tana hmasawnna thlen thei tur project tha tak tak DCIP atang an neih theih ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Mizoram District Transformation Programme hnuaia department hrang hrangin District Catalytic Intervention Plan an siam te chu line department hotuten an sawifiah a, DPC-ina pawmpuite chu State level-ah thehluh a ni ang a, hemi zawh hian Ministry level-ah hma lak tur a ni ang.

Vawiin thutkhawm hi Pu Srinivas Sadi, DPC Chairperson & DC chuan kai hruaiin, Pi C. Lalnunsiami, SRO-cum Under Secretary, P&PID, DPC member secretary ni bawk bakah DPC member te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: DC Pu Paul Khuma’n Leng khuaah East Lungdar Area MUP Conference a hmanpui
content:
4591/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 25th February, 2026:Lenga cham mek Serchhip DC Pu Paul Khuma chuan vawiin khan East Lungdar Area MUP Conference, Leng Saihnuna Hall-a neih chu khuallian niin a hmanpui.

DC chuan MUP member te chu an naupan laia an nu leh pa te thu an awih avangin vawiin thlengin Pathian malsawmna leh kaihhruaina an dawng a ni, a ti a. Upa te chu kan khawtlang nunah an pawimawhzia hriaa tha tho taka tel zel tur leh hma hruaitu ni zel turin a sawm a. An tu leh fate tawngtaisaka kaihhruaitu ni zel turin a chah a ni.

Japan-a Okinawa chu khawvelah kum 100 chunglam dam thleng tamna ber a ni a. Mi thiamte zir chianna atangin, dam rei an tamna chhan lian tak chu, kum upa te anmahni chauha khawhar taka awm loin an inkawm hlim thin, tih a ni a. Hetiang kawngah hian Mizoten MUP kan nei hi kan vannei hle a ni, tiin Pu Paul L Khuma chuan MUP hruaitute pawimawhzia hre thar leh turin a chah a ni.

Vawiin programme hi Lungdar Area MUP President Pu C Bawizuala’n a kaihruai a. Conference inkara an member thi mi 27 (mipa - 23, hmeichhia -4) sunna hun an hmang a. Chawhnu lamah Lengkhawm Zaia intihsiakna hun an hmang a ni.

Attachment

title: SP MAMIT HNEN ATANGA HRIATTIRNA
content:
4590/2025-2026

Dated : Mamit the 25th of February, 2026 :Mamit District chhung Rawpuichhip to Buarpui Road (Chainage 0.00 kmp to 72.27 kmp) chu PWD, Govt. of Mizoram hnuaiah M/S Inckah Infrastructure Technologies Pvt. Ltd. te chuan a siam that hna (Full Depth Reclamation & Cold Mix Technology) an thawk mek a. He lai kawngpui an siam chhunga chak zawka hna an thawh theihna turin helai kawng West Lungdar leh Kanghmun inkara (Chainage 24+000 to 45+000) lirthei tlan dan tur ruahmanna siam a ngai a hriat a ni a.

Chuvangin, Pu Manny Bhushan Singh, IPS, Superintendent of Police, Mamit District chuan Motor Vehicle Act, 1988 (Act 59 of 1988) section 115 leh Mizoram Sawrkar Notification No. B.12021/10/2004-TRP Dt.01.06.2020 in thuneihnaa pek angin "Mamit District chhung Rawpuichhip to Buarpui Road a West Lungdar leh Kanghmun inkar kawng (Chainage 24+000 kmp to 45+000 kmp) a lirthei tlan dan tur hetiang hian ruahmanna a siam.

He thupek hian thla khat chhung Dt.25.2.2026 (Nilaini) ațanga Dt.26.3.2026 (Nilaithawhţanni) thleng a huam ang.

He thupek hian Magistrate, VIP, Police, Excise, Paramilitary Force, damlo phur motor leh Emergency thil te a huam lovang.

Mipuite himna tur leh kawngpui tha zawk kan neihna tur atana thupek hi zawm theuh turin mipuite kan inngenin kan inhriattir a. Thupek zawmlo te chu 179 MV Act hmanga hrem an ni ang.

Attachment

title: Khawzawlah District Water & Sanitation Mission (DWSM) meeting neih a ni
content:
4589/2025-2026

Khawzawl dated 24th February 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dar 3 khan khawzawl DC Auditorium-ah District Water & Sanitation Mission (DWSM) meeting neih niin Khawzawl Bawrhsap leh Chairman ni bawk Pu K. Vanlalthiana'n a kaihruai.

Khawzawl Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan meeting a lo kal khawm te chu lo lawmin, member te chu an hma lak tawh te chu a that zia thu a sawi a, an kal leh zelna turah a aia nasaa tan la turin leh a aia tha zawka an thawh ho zel a beisei thu sawiin tui ren a tul zia leh tan a pawimawh zia te a sawi bawk a ni.

District Water & Sanitation Mission (DWSM) review meeting-ah hian Jal Jeevan Mission te, SBM-G te leh Jal Sanchay Jan Baghidari (JSJB) hnuaia an hmalak tawh te, an thawh mek te leh an kal zel dan tur te en ho a ni. Meeting hmasaa CMO in Health and Wellness Centre hrang hrang te'n tui lama harsatna an tawh chu PHE-in an hma lak dan te sawi hoin an kal zel dan tur ngaihtuah zui nghal a ni.
